overview: Loot Goblin is a Normal-class Humanoid/Beast monster found in Goblin Cave. 1 grades: Common. Base stats (Common): 650 HP, 24 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 5 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage:  at 150% ratio (360 base damage). Sight range 800, combat radius 110.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 800 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 800 units, loses target at 1800 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 110, ability check distance 150
strategies.description: Combat area radius 110. Ability check distance 150. Ability attack delay: 0.8s.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 800 units. Loses target at 1800 units.
